match.userMessage:
Eye-level handheld camera with natural micro-movement holds on Scarlett as she turns toward lens mid-laugh. A larger wave rolls in from behind, foaming white at her knees and swirling water around her calves while light sea spray rises. Wet sand shifts beneath her feet as she braces lightly against the incoming surf. Coral lips catch the sun. Gentle wind lifts fabric edges on her linen shirt.

Ambient sounds: gentle ocean waves lapping with light coastal breeze. wave foaming and splashing at knees, light sea spray.
